I stayed at the Hilton Union Square this weekend and ended up visiting Cityscape three different times during my stay. On my first visit, I was helped by Jose, and he absolutely made the experience.

Not only was he friendly and welcoming, but he took the time to explain some of the history of the bar and recommend several tequila-based cocktails that turned out to be fantastic. His knowledge and customer service were so good that I specifically looked for him on my next two visits.

The views at Cityscape are incredible, with different perspectives of San Francisco depending on which side of the bar you're on. Yes, the drinks are on the pricier side, but between the quality, atmosphere, and unbeatable views, they're well worth it.

One thing I really like is how easy it is to visit. Just walk into the Hilton Union Square, head to the elevators, and go straight to the 46th floor--no check-in or hassle required.

A big shoutout to Jose for making every visit memorable. Great drinks, amazing views, and outstanding service. I'll definitely be back.

We had my Son's wedding rehearsal dinner and drinks at the CityScapes. They are amazing to work with.  I planned from out of state and Mary was always in communication and went above and beyond for us to make sure we had a memorable experience there! We had Jewel as our point of contact that evening and the fabulous Jose as our waiter! Highly recommend!!

⭐⭐⭐⭐ An absolute highlight in San Francisco!

If you want to experience the city at its best, you have to come here. The view from this rooftop bar is simply indescribable: You have an amazing panorama over the entire skyline from San Francisco down to the harbor. Especially at sunset, when the lights of the city and the ships in the harbour begin to sparkle, the atmosphere is magical.
To the drinks:
Yes, prices are up – but let’s face it: This is San Francisco. You pay for quality everywhere, and in this case you get the most spectacular view of the city for free with a drink. For me, the price is absolutely justified given this location and the nimble service. A drink here feels like a short break.
Conclusion: Great atmosphere, chic audience and a view that you won't forget anytime soon. Definitely my new favorite place for a special evening!
Tip: It's best to reserve or get there early to get a seat right on the glass front!
